description: DESTRUCTIVE. Prepare artifacts then execute or submit the generated launch script via run_pacsomatic.py --run: local/none runs `bash <script>`; lsf submits `bsub < <script>`; slurm `sbatch <script>`; pbs/sge `qsub <script>`. Launches the real nf-core/pacsomatic pipeline and/or enqueues a real scheduler job.
rules: destructive — executes the pipeline locally or submits a job to a live scheduler
requires a resolvable nextflow runtime; scheduler executors additionally require the matching submit binary (bsub/sbatch/qsub) on PATH
exactly one reference mode: provide FASTA or GENOME; local BAMs must exist
in --run mode missing nextflow/java/scheduler tools are HARD failures (not warnings)
writes submit.log plus the artifact set; the detected scheduler job id is echoed when parseable
usage: Set PATIENT_ID, TUMOR_SAMPLE_ID, NORMAL_SAMPLE_ID, TUMOR_BAM, NORMAL_BAM, one of FASTA or GENOME, and PROFILE/EXECUTOR. Output: submit.log.
limitation: Cannot run hermetically: needs nextflow + the container/conda runtime, and a live scheduler for non-local executors. Use the dry-run perk to validate offline first.
